channel.title: Anthropic on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Anthropic on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally available: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 on Azure Databricks
item.description:
Azure Databricks now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 via AI Model Serving. The update says the model offers near-Opus-level intelligence with Sonnet-level cost efficiency and speed.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Claude Sonnet 5 is generally available for GitHub Copilot
item.description:
Claude Sonnet 5 is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. GitHub says it offers strong coding performance for everyday development and agentic workflows as a new Sonnet-class model option.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Claude Fable 5 is generally available for GitHub Copilot
item.description:
Claude Fable 5 from Anthropic is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. GitHub describes it as a Mythos-class model aimed at long-horizon, autonomous coding and knowledge-work tasks.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure API Management now supports AI gateway capabilities for Anthropic and Vertex AI models.
item.description:
Azure API Management is now generally available with AI gateway capabilities for Anthropic and Vertex AI models. The feature adds centralized controls for securing, governing, and observing model interactions across these external AI providers.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Claude Opus 4.8 is generally available for GitHub Copilot
item.description:
Claude Opus 4.8 is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. GitHub says early testing showed improved code understanding and generation compared with earlier models.

  • Source: GitHub
